name: marketing-girl-dirty-fixture
comment: DIRTY ingest fixture (Phase-11 Plan 02 / PIPE-04 / D-P11-07). Mirrors the broken-template negative-fixture idiom: a small, committed, compile-irrelevant raw-Lovable-export shape, scanned by `scanIngest` BY FOLDER PATH only (never imported into the Next graph). `react-quill` is an UNVETTED dep absent from scripts/template-allowlist.ts ALLOWED_IMPORT_SPECIFIERS -> the dep parse pushes an `unknown-dependency` FLAG (tier 'flag', NEVER blocks the input-scan exit code, D-P11-06 two-tier). `canvas-confetti` is a second unvetted dep for breadth. The must-strip RED triggers live in App.tsx.
